pass/clean-full-model.situation: Final clean output of the run-1..run-25 iteration. Every page passes every scanner. Regression sentinel — if a future change to the generator breaks this, something regressed.

fail/edges-cross-classes.situation: Layout deliberately broken so PracticeSkill->Reference is routed straight through the Practice rectangle. Visibly violates cross-classes; the rewired routes also trip overlap-edges, cross-other-edges, and approach-perpendicular.

fail/edges-cross-classes-handcurated.situation: Hand-curated reference diagram with edges deliberately re-routed across other class rectangles. Visibly violates cross-classes even before running a scanner. Side effect: also trips overlap-edges where the redirected edges run alongside existing ones.

fail/edges-overlap-edges.situation: AbdSkill->Scanner and AbdSkill->Template both run along y=90 from x=851 to x=1267, visibly stacked on top of each other. The reshape also re-anchors those edges' source segments, which is what trips approach-perpendicular.

fail/edges-cross-other-edges.situation: Mid-iteration regression from the mirrored-perpendicular-relocation work. AbdSkill->Reference and AbdSkill->Rule cross PracticeSkill->Reference transversely; SupportSkill->PracticeSkill crosses Practice->Reference; several edges approach non-perpendicular.

fail/parallel-approach-self-intersect.situation: The famous self-intersection case: AiChatAgent->Subagent exits the LEFT side of AiChatAgent but then heads RIGHT, slicing through its own source rectangle. The first three scanners are blind to this — only the perpendicular scanner catches it. Surfaced the need for signed-direction checks and _path_self_intersects routing.

fail/uncorrected-baseline.situation: The full 3-page CLI output from run-1 before any of the run-2..run-25 fixes landed. All tabs present as originally generated. Multi-rule sentinel — useful for confirming that adding new scanners or rules doesn't accidentally make this output look 'better' than it is.

fail/story-graph-inheritance-crosses-epi.situation: StoryGraph->ContextPerspectiveGraph inheritance edge routes top-to-top at mid-x~687, crossing Epic (x=645-905, y=670-762). The diagram also has pre-existing overlap, cross-edge, and perpendicular-approach violations on other edges that were already present at capture time and are not the focus of this fixture.

fail/domain-graph-edges-cross-domain-gra.situation: DomainConceptNode->DomainNode association and inheritance edges both route through the DomainGraph class rectangle. The diagram also has pre-existing overlap, cross-edge, and perpendicular-approach violations on other edges that were already present at capture time and are not the focus of this fixture.

pass/story-graph-inheritance-fixed.situation: StoryGraph->ContextPerspectiveGraph rerouted: exit bottom, waypoint (960,826), enter CPG top. Path stays below Epic and right of all row-3 classes. The edges_do_not_cross_classes violation is fixed (the focus of this fixture); other pre-existing overlap, cross-edge, and perpendicular violations on unrelated edges were present at capture time and remain.

fail/onboarding-leaves-horizontal-row.situation: Customer (Onboarding) page from the pml-domain diagram where the CLI placed all 7 leaf nodes (Identity, Address, Cart, Metadata, Plan, Order, Portability) in a single horizontal row at y=514, stretching the canvas to ~2420px wide. The hub class OnboardingCustomer sits at y=60 with no fan. Also has a pre-existing UserProfile->Address perpendicular-approach violation. Only leaf_nodes_not_in_horizontal_row catches the anti-pattern being tested.

pass/domain-graph-edges-fixed.situation: DomainConceptNode->DomainNode edges rerouted via left corridor (x~332-340, y=300) above DomainGraph. Distinct anchors on source; association enters top, inheritance enters bottom. The edges_do_not_cross_classes violation is fixed (the focus of this fixture); other pre-existing overlap, cross-edge, and perpendicular violations on unrelated edges were present at capture time and remain.
